positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a mythical forest clearing at sunrise. The central subject is a serene, stylized stag standing amidst glowing bioluminescent flora and delicate mist. Use strong contrast between deep emerald greens and warm golds, highlighted by soft, ethereal backlighting. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, featuring clean, bold lines and silhouette elements for high print fidelity. Include abstract geometric forest patterns woven subtly into the background mist and leaves. Style: Modern folk art, watercolor ink, vector aesthetic, suitable for apparel printing. Full body shot of the stag, surrounded by lush, stylized vegetation. Aspect ratio 1:1.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, grunge, photorealism, logo, trademark, copyrighted character, celebrity likeness, artist name
